hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*|*"git push"*|*"gh pr create"*) branch=$(git -C /Users/jeongchanho/Documents/Android/Twix branch --show-current); case "$branch" in main|master|develop) echo "Blocked: run commit/push/PR from a work branch, not $branch"; exit 1 ;; esac ;; esac
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) cd /Users/jeongchanho/Documents/Android/Twix && ./gradlew ktlintCheck 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *"compileDebugKotlin"*) cd /Users/jeongchanho/Documents/Android/Twix && ./gradlew ktlintFormat 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.kt) cd /Users/jeongchanho/Documents/Android/Twix && ./gradlew ktlintFormat 2>&1 | tail -5 ;; esac
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *"compileDebugKotlin"*) cd /Users/jeongchanho/Documents/Android/Twix && ./gradlew ktlintFormat 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac
